checked_dimensions.name: spec_compliance
checked_dimensions.evidence: Issue 073 follows the requested order: real feature pilot, templates, controlled runner, schemas, CI authority, Standard Loop v1, and V5 boundary.

checked_dimensions.name: acceptance_criteria
checked_dimensions.evidence: AC-216 through AC-233 and AT-036 are represented by docs, templates, schema registration, CLI commands, runtime execution evidence, validators, CLI coverage, negative coverage, final report, audit packet, and ChatGPT/Codex audit.

checked_dimensions.name: policy_boundaries
checked_dimensions.evidence: The task stayed inside the issue 073 contract and scope manifest. Workflow files remained read-only and CI authority is documented against existing GitHub CI workflows.

checked_dimensions.name: security_rules
checked_dimensions.evidence: The controlled runner dry-run records false execution policy booleans for Claude launch, Antigravity launch, shell execution, network, protected resources, production, dependency installation, and deployment.

checked_dimensions.name: changed_file_scope
checked_dimensions.evidence: Changed files are listed in the final report and covered by the issue 073 scope manifest. Local untracked .agents and .claude/settings.local.json remain outside staged task scope.

checked_dimensions.name: test_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: Standard validation, CLI tests, negative validation tests, smoke validation, runtime execution validation, template validation, CI authority validation, schema validation, final report validation, audit packet validation, ChatGPT audit validation, security gate, review gate, standard-loop-status, execute-runtime-launch dry-run, and git diff whitespace validation are recorded as passed or not_collected where external CI is pending.

checked_dimensions.name: ci_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: Local CI-equivalent validation passed. GitHub PR CI remains a required external merge gate and must pass before automatic merge.

checked_dimensions.name: final_report_honesty
checked_dimensions.evidence: The final report records changed files, local validation evidence, GitHub CI not_collected before push, no deployment, and V5 live parallel execution as future work.

findings.evidence: Standard Loop v1 now defines the canonical path from goal to policy-gated merge and points live parallel execution to a future V5 contract.
findings.recommendation: Use the next dedicated contract to run a small live parallel Antigravity pilot only after GitHub CI passes for this package.

unresolved_risks: GitHub PR CI evidence is pending until the branch is pushed and checks run.
V5 live parallel Antigravity execution remains planned and requires a dedicated future contract before live multi-session execution.
